name_cn:
🔥Raffia Weave Black/Gold
This newly released Oxalis woven shoulder bag is the perfect choice for vacations and play. It features a raffia weave with a mesh texture and a cutout style that creates a lightweight, see-through visual effect, while also adding a touch of sophistication! Paired with a double-layer leather shoulder strap, the iconic gold metal hardware in the center becomes the highlight 👍
Model: 781289 [Original Leather]
Size: 37x40x3cm
